gh_b515951a8597751ca4cb1e35.title: [Remote] Software developer @ Timelineapp
gh_b515951a8597751ca4cb1e35.description:
Timelineapp is a service for the financial advisers (mostly in the UK) helping them to build and discuss investment strategies and retirement plans with their clients. Our front-end is almost 100% in Elm, the back-end is in Elixir (we use Phoenix framework), and a very important part has recently been rewritten in Rust. We’re looking for a person to develop both parts of the application (i.e., someone with full-stack capabilities and/or ambitions). Our development team is fully remote. 

More information and the link to apply is available in [the job posting](https://timelineapp.freshteam.com/jobs/-rhCfxf_dSVo/software-developer-software-engineer-remote).
